name: vscodex
description: VS Code extension with Codex agent chat, code-change apply flow, and editor autocomplete.

commands.title: Codex Chat: Add Editor Selection as Context

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.enable.description: Turns Codex inline autocomplete on or off in the editor. Disable this if you only want chat and no ghost-text suggestions.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.minPre.description: Minimum amount of typed non-space context before a suggestion request is allowed. Increase this to reduce noise and accidental requests.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.prefix.description: How many characters before the cursor are sent to Codex as prefix context. Larger values improve context quality but increase payload size and latency.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.suffix.description: How many characters after the cursor are sent to Codex as suffix context. This helps Codex avoid inserting text that conflicts with upcoming code.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.deboun.description: Delay in milliseconds after typing before an automatic request is sent. Increase it to reduce request frequency, decrease it for faster reactions.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.postAc.description: Pause in milliseconds after accepting a suggestion before requesting the next one. This prevents immediate follow-up requests after a completion is applied.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.offere.description: How long to remember the last offered suggestion for accept-detection logic. After this TTL, old suggestions are ignored and cleaned up.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.reques.description: Timeout in milliseconds for automatic autocomplete requests. Keep it lower to avoid stale ghost-text and to keep typing responsive.
Timeout in milliseconds for manual autocomplete trigger command. Higher values allow slower model responses when you explicitly request completion.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.maxInF.description: Maximum number of concurrent autocomplete requests. Keep it at 1 for strict ordering and lower network pressure.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.cacheS.description: Size of the main inline completion cache in entries. Set to 0 to disable cache reuse completely.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.contin.description: Size of the continuation cache used while you keep typing after a suggestion. Set to 0 to disable continuation reuse.

codexOAuthChat.editorAutocomplete.transp.description: Backoff duration in milliseconds after transport/network failures from Codex. During backoff, automatic requests are skipped to avoid spamming retries.

codexOAuthChat.logging.level.description: Controls how verbose extension logs are in the "Codex OAuth Debug" output channel. Use "info" or "warn" to suppress noisy debug traces while keeping important records.
